mapper.select:
SELECT t.TRX_ID AS id, t.TRX_NAME AS name, t.TRX_ID AS col1, tm.ORG_ID AS col2, DECODE(tm.IO_TYPE, 'I', '기동', '수동') AS col3, t.TRX_NAME AS col4 FROM FWK_TRX t LEFT JOIN FWK_TRX_MESSAGE tm ON t.TRX_ID = tm.TRX_ID
AND tm.ORG_ID = #{orgId}
AND UPPER(t.TRX_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
AND UPPER(t.TRX_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
ORDER BY t.TRX_ID

SELECT m.MESSAGE_ID AS id, m.MESSAGE_NAME AS name, m.MESSAGE_ID AS col1, m.ORG_ID AS col2, m.MESSAGE_NAME AS col3, NULL AS col4 FROM FWK_MESSAGE m
AND m.ORG_ID = #{orgId}
AND UPPER(m.MESSAGE_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
AND UPPER(m.MESSAGE_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
ORDER BY m.MESSAGE_ID

SELECT cg.CODE_GROUP_ID AS id, cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME AS name, cg.CODE_GROUP_ID AS col1, cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME AS col2, NULL AS col3, NULL AS col4 FROM FWK_CODE_GROUP cg
AND UPPER(cg.CODE_GROUP_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
AND UPPER(cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
ORDER BY cg.CODE_GROUP_ID

SELECT a.MENU_URL AS id, a.MENU_NAME AS name, a.MENU_URL AS col1, a.MENU_NAME AS col2, NULL AS col3, NULL AS col4 FROM FWK_CUST_MENU_APP a
AND UPPER(a.MENU_URL) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
AND UPPER(a.MENU_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
ORDER BY a.MENU_URL

SELECT s.SERVICE_ID AS id, s.SERVICE_NAME AS name, s.SERVICE_ID AS col1, s.SERVICE_NAME AS col2, NULL AS col3, NULL AS col4 FROM FWK_SERVICE s
AND UPPER(s.SERVICE_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
AND UPPER(s.SERVICE_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
ORDER BY s.SERVICE_ID

SELECT e.ERROR_CODE AS id, e.ERROR_TITLE AS name, e.ERROR_CODE AS col1, e.ERROR_TITLE AS col2, NULL AS col3, NULL AS col4 FROM FWK_ERROR e
AND UPPER(e.ERROR_CODE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
AND UPPER(e.ERROR_TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
ORDER BY e.ERROR_CODE

SELECT c.COMPONENT_ID AS id, c.COMPONENT_NAME AS name, c.COMPONENT_ID AS col1, c.COMPONENT_NAME AS col2, c.COMPONENT_CLASS_NAME AS col3, NULL AS col4 FROM FWK_COMPONENT c
AND UPPER(c.COMPONENT_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
AND UPPER(c.COMPONENT_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
AND UPPER(c.COMPONENT_CLASS_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
ORDER BY c.COMPONENT_ID

SELECT p.PROPERTY_ID AS id, p.PROPERTY_NAME AS name, p.PROPERTY_ID AS col1, p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID AS col2, p.DEFAULT_VALUE AS col3, p.PROPERTY_NAME AS col4 FROM FWK_PROPERTY p
AND UPPER(p.PROPERTY_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
AND UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%'
ORDER BY p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, p.PROPERTY_ID
